programme.desc: North Carolina is home to mysteries, giant industries, and coastal beauty.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: This aerial tour over Vermont captures the beauty and history of a state that chose its own path.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: A solo hiker in the Carpathian Mountains breaks his hip and femur when he is crushed by multiple avalanches.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: When winter unleashes its full fury Kyle and Ben get caught in its crosshairs. In Alaska, Marty's gamble on new country pays off.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: In the Revelation Mountains of Alaska, Marty is forced to make a dangerous river crossing to return to base camp.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: In the Revelation Mountains of Alaska, Marty faces off with a vicious wolverine. In Montana, Rich tries to protect a young family from a hungry predator.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As the bitter cold pushes predators to the edge, Tom is caught in a close-range battle while Rich goes head to head with a pack of wolves.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: A visit from Tom's son Chad goes terribly wrong and Marty's flight back from the Revelation Mountains is delayed.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty is stranded in the Revelation Mountains with one last chance to get home, while Kyle and Ben launch a nighttime stakeout to stop a predator.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Two massive prehistoric monsters are better than one, so Cyril travels to the dangerous swamps and wild coast of Louisiana to track down a pair of predators that hunt its murky waters.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril has come to the remote jungle rivers of Nicaragua on a mission to catch one of the most explosive fish on the planet. Weighing over 300 pounds and measuring 8 feet long, the tarpon is a real primitive titan.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Growing to over 1400 lbs, the blue fin tuna is a true titan prowling the oceans, and it's extremely powerful and fast. To help protect these endangered giants, Cyril is recruited by a team of biologists to travel up the East Coast of the USA and Canada.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Weighing over 1300 pounds, the colossal marlin is one of the most storied predators in the ocean. Armed with a sword-like bill, it's super powerful and can explode out of the water, causing chaos and even serious accidents on boats.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril has heard that although super-dangerous, the waters surrounding the remote archipelago of the Bissagos Islands in Guinea-Bissau are home to a fish known for putting up a brutal fight: the Cubera.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom battles a dangerous ice jam. Marty launches a last-ditch escape from the Revelations, and a deadly predator returns to the Ruby Valley.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty is forced to make a mid-flight detour that costs him precious fuel; Rich faces his worst fear when the dogs run off in pursuit of a deadly predator, and Kyle takes down a beast.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: After winning a black light putt-putt golf course, Jenn's game is tested when she realizes that for her run, "MINI-golf" is a misnomer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jenn won't save the world, but she better make her deadline when she hauls a 16-foot-tall Power Ranger to a child's birthday party.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett learns the answer to the question, "Where does the world's largest hog sit?" (anywhere it wants), while hauling a shipment of epic proportions.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: While shipping an 11-foot-tall glass water pipe to the Mile-High City, Marc tries to mellow out after a blown tire threatens to turn this shipment into shards.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jenn gives the University of Texas Marching band's massive drum, Big Bertha a beating, while Todd and Tamera face a train wreck.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Dusty connects with his inner nerd after booking Star Wars movie memorabilia along with a massive Kung Fu Panda statue.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and a 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, a 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capital City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy’s paltry gifts are no match for Cindy’s foul mood at the auction in Scarborough.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: With Bogart on crutches and Cindy nursing a cold, it’s a tough day at the auction for all the buyers in Guelph.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy brings a “Roy-Puppet” to an auction in Brampton, and they’re both very naughty little boys.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy hires bodyguards to keep the riff-raff away at an auction in Brampton. Bogart quits, but just when he thinks he's out can Paul pull him back in? Rick and Cindy make a wicked-awesome discovery, and Ursula gets carried away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Ursula hopes her pet chinchilla will bring her luck at an auction in East Gwillimbury, but little Monty has ideas of his own. Rick and Cindy get into watersports, Paul and Bogart make a virtue of chastity, and Roy comes to work in his pajamas.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: To his own amusement, Roy brings a mime to an auction in Corktown. Rick and Cindy arrive in a foul mood, Bogart hopes to whip Paul into shape, and Ursula aims to skewer the competition. Later, Roy gets a weather lesson from BT's Frank Ferragine.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The bachelor party Roy has planned for Bogart is all anyone can talk about. Before the party can begin, Paul and Bogart take care of some adorable business and Rick and Cindy hope to make some money at the track when they meet up with an Olympian.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Ursula goes ape at an auction when Roy says her coat makes her look like a monkey. Paul and Bogart set a bad example for returning buyer Jeff Gardner and his son. It takes a lot for Rick and Cindy to bid on their locker and Roy's out for blood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: North York becomes an archaeological dig as buyers unearth pieces of the past that could enrich their future.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Ursula puts up with her bossy older sister, Rick takes the reins, Roy calls the cops, and Paul and Bogart lose their sh*t.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Tempers flare and prices soar as the buyers confront aggressive guest auctioneer Jeff Schwartz, aka “The Liquidator.”

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The Thornhill buyers run for cover when a self-help CD gives Roy a new lease on his egomaniacal life.

programme.desc: Kirk and Spock go back in time to save McCoy from temporary insanity.

programme.desc: Kirk and the U.S.S. Enterprise must combat parasitic aliens.

programme.desc: Spock must return to Vulcan to meet his intended future wife, betrothed from childhood.

programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters an alien who claims to be the Greek god Apollo.

programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters an ancient Earth probe bent on the sterilization of all life.

programme.desc: A transporter accident places Captain Kirk's landing party in an alternate universe, where the Enterprise is in the service of a barbarically brutal empire.

programme.desc: Quark feels threatened when a charming swindler arrives on Deep Space Nine and opens a competing bar.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo's mentor arrives on Deep Space Nine intent on resuming his search for Odo's true origin.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When Quark is reunited with the love of his life, a Cardassian who is now a fugitive, he is ready to sacrifice everything to win her back.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise pursues a race of "gatherers" who continue to raid Federation outposts, unaware of the dangers lurking among them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a Romulan officer defects to the Federation with a warning of an impending invasion, Capt. Picard struggles to decide if he is to be believed.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Investigating a planet applying for membership into the Federation, the crew of the Enterprise finds a group of inhabitants who used to be soldiers but now fight for their very existence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Much to Picard's displeasure, Q reappears on the Enterprise, claiming to have been ejected from the Q Continuum, and therefore, lost his powers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The widow of respected scientist Dr. Nel Apgar accuses Riker of seducing her and killing her husband. Rather than turn Riker over for unfavorable trial, the Enterprise reconstructs the facts.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise C enters the Enterprise D's time and space continuum, where they find Picard and crew in a constant state of war with the Klingons, and only Guinan knows it.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches out to an alien being while dancing around with the Romulans, who want to attack it in an act of vengeance.

programme.desc: Convicted of a crime they didn't commit, Paris and Kim may spend the rest of their lives in a hellish prison.

programme.desc: While the crew battles a swarm of alien ships, Kes struggles to stop the Doctor's memory circuits from deteriorating.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew tries to free the people of the planet Takar from two Ferengi opportunists posing as gods.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres is troubled by a series of dreams in which she seems to be reliving another woman's life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: To save Kes's life, Janeway must test her own spiritual beliefs by undergoing the secret ritual of an alien religious order.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew visits 20th century Los Angeles to prevent a timeship from destroying the Earth's solar system.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew races against time to stop a 20th century computer industrialist from causing a 29th century disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kes's body is taken over by the mind of a ruthless political leader who's determined to regain control of his planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway is stunned when Q asks her to be the mother of his child.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway, Neelix and the Doctor must retake Voyager from an infestation of microorganisms.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix's efforts to assist the crew wind up involving him in a deadly narcotics ring.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A Holodeck character's obsession with Tuvok threatens to destroy Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway finds herself trapped in a mysterious time loop, where a series of events repeatedly end in her death.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A Vulcan mating ritual pits Torres against a fellow crewmember, while Chakotay makes a shocking discovery about invaders of a strange planet.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Lorne discovers a planet with dozens of satellites in orbit. However, inhabitants on this planet are no further advanced than the renaissance and have a flag with McKay's face. The team realize a game they had found earlier might be more than a game.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Investigating an abandoned space station, McKay mistakenly brings one of its scientists out of stasis. The scientist explains to the team that the base was the last effort by his people to avoid the repeated culling they've endured by the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With the entire city ordered to take a personal day the team does their best to unwind and enjoy their leisure time. Without warning a mysterious explosion rips through the city killing and injuring unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches the ocean for a mobile geothermal drilling station the ancients left dormant. Cautiously exploring the station, Teyla thinks she senses the presence of a Wraith. Weir, believing it's pressure affecting Teyla, has the team press on.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Destiny is on a collision course with an ancient ship found floating in space. Panic turns to wonder as the ships dock with each other. The crew discovers that it might hold the key to a connection back to Earth and other hidden secrets.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: On Destiny, Chloe's behavior has become a cause of concern and a worried Scott makes a shocking discovery while searching her quarters: a journal with Alien script. He shows it to Young and Rush who decide they must keep a constant eye on Chloe.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: While exploring a new planet, Lt. Scott is attacked by an aggressive plant-like creature that infects him. Scott's circumstances turn dire and Tamara must search for a way to stop the alien infection from spreading while more creatures move in.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Col. Young (Louis Ferreira) is plagued by a recurring vision wherein Destiny is attacked and destroyed by aliens. After placing the crew on high alert, he starts to feel that he may be losing his mind and questions his ability as the commander!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Carter's father has been captured on a moon transformed into hell. No one but Jolinar has ever escaped from hell, so Tok'ra technology is used to access Jolinar's memories from Carter's mind…but not before an old foe shows up to foil the mission!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During a rescue attempt, SG-1 is caught by one of hell's denizens, who is determined to use the information they have to overthrow Goa'uld lord Sokar. Using Tok'ra technology, the team is forced to relive painful memories…but how much can they take?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During routine medical exams, Dr. Fraiser injects each team member with a sedative. Teal'c awakens and sees General Hammond conspiring with Fraiser and two aliens. What has happened at Stargate Command, and can SG-1 overpower its own allies?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 is invited to planet Tollan to attend a Triad ceremony, they are shocked to discover it is actually a trial to determine the fate of their friend Skaara. Daniel and O'Neill must argue a case against a mysterious Goa'uld to save Skaara.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: En route to a planet, the SG-1 are implanted with an alien spore that evolves into a being called Urgo. Though Urgo claims to be friendly, the suspicious team members work feverishly to rid themselves of the creature before it destroys their minds.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 visits the friendly planet Edora and gathers to watch the annual meteor shower that lights up the sky like a fiery rain. But suddenly, wayward asteroids bombard the planet, destroying the Stargate. Can O'Neill and the team ever return home?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tiptoes down memory lane in Orange, Calif.; Brandi and Jarrod get to work on a tool locker; Darrell and his granddaughter dig up a creepy find.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of L. Frank Baum’s classic 'Wonderful Wizard of Oz' – told from Pupcake’s point of view.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there’s an environmental disaster in the works.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: This is the story of 'Rapunzel', but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it’s supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn’t going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s cat Custard is shown to live a pampered, adored existence in Strawberry’s house. But Custard’s dream set-up is shattered by the sudden arrival of a rambunctious stray puppy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Conniving Peppermint Fizz talks the other kids into a competition to see whose pet is best. Peppermint cheats so that her pet, Cola Chameleon, wins best pet.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is feeling left out of all the kids’ play. She’s the only one with four legs. There’s no one like her to talk to and share her feelings.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything 'just so' — and when things don’t go her way, she’s a pretty bad sport.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & Friends go on an overnight campout, Ginger Snap doesn’t want them to find out, she’s afraid of the dark!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: There’s someone…or something strange in the neighborhood, and the kids imagine the worst.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is made to feel self-conscious about an old, patched-together raincoat that she has.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz wants to exclude a new girl, Blueberry Muffin, because she’s 'different' – in the way she looks, lives, talks, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s friend Coco Calypso lives on Seaberry Beach with her pet, Papaya Parrot, and a band of fun-loving monkeys.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: A fantasy episode in which Strawberry, Rainbow Sherbet, Blueberry Muffin, Coco Calypso, and Seaberry Delight imagine themselves as Mermaids, drawn into a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s friendship letter to children worldwide elicits Crepes Suzette's invitation to visit Pearis and the Pieffel Tower.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones face a demon who has been killing leprechauns and stealing their magic. The leprechauns endow the sisters with good luck, which enables Paige to gain material wealth, Phoebe to meet a man, and Piper to book a major star to play P3.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Piper and Leo begin to have marital problems, Piper casts a spell to allow them to literally see their past together. However, the spell goes awry when Phoebe and Paige are sent back in time to relive Piper's memories.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When a demon attacks and kills one of the three nympths that protect a lake, the Charmed ones try to help. However, once the demon is destroyed, the nypmphs decide Paige should replace the fallen nymph, and they won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In order to get close to baby Wyatt, the Crone steals one of the senses from each of the Charmed Ones, in an attempt to fool the child. The Charmed Ones run into major complications without their senses.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Grams comes to the manor for a Wiccan birthing ceremony, for Wyatt, the sisters find out that she has brought a memory from her past, a former lover who wants to kill the Charmed Ones and bring back the love they once shared.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When the mythic Gods, the Titans, are released and kill all the elders, Leo is forced to take over. Meanwhile, a mysterious Whitelighter from the future guides the Charmed Ones when Leo gives the girls the ultimate power to vanquish the Titans.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe and Paige search for Leo after Paige accidentally causes a 'chipper' Piper to have amnesia, but the sisters soon learn he is being held on the mythical Island of Valhalla.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Cleaners kidnap Wyatt and erase his existence, after the child accidentally brings a dragon to life. When Piper, Phoebe and Paige regain their memories they relive the day Wyatt was kidnapped.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When three evil sisters magically steal the Charmed Ones' identities and powers, Piper, Phoebe and Paige must convince Chris that they are the real Charmed Ones in order to get their lives back.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda's first ghost reappears, her presence triggers Melinda to remember when she first discovered her "gift" and the strain it put on her relationship with her mother, who couldn't understand what Melinda was going through.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When the ghost of Andrea's friend starts haunting her, Andrea learns that he was hospitalized in a hiking accident and every time he flat lines, his ghost tries to give her clues.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Shredder has a hare-brained scheme to turn the rabbit from another dimension into an ally.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Krang creates Metalhead, an exact robot replica of the Turtles with even more powers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Leatherhead The Cajan gator goes into the sewers in pursuit of the Turtles, and encounters the Rat King.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Shredder captures Irma and creates an android Irma programmed to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Mobster Don Turtelli and his cousin, the Great Baldini, steal the famous Tortellini Emerald.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: The Turtles are showing Zach, "the fifth Turtle," and his brother Walt their scrapbook.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Michelangelo falls for a Shredder trick and eats a chocolate chip cookie made with anti-mutagen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: The Neutrinos - Dask, Kala and Zak - are back on Earth in search of Kala's pet Grybyx.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Krang discovers that a formula exists in Dimension Z which transmutes crude oil to liquid nitrogen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: The Turtles lament that the world would be a better place had they never existed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Baxter, who turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: The Technodrome is close to running out of power as it teeters on the edge of a lava cliff.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder get the Technodrome rolling again and raise it to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder raise the Technodrome to the surface and seize unlimited energy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: The Turtles launch the missile from the sewers positioned under the Technodrome. It transports Bebop, Rocksteady, Krang and Shredder back to Dimension X but explodes on impact; they survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Donatello's idol, inventor mad-scientist Professor Willard creates the Molecular Intensifier, a machine to control growth of living things.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Michelangelo dreams he's being attacked by Tyranno-toys. He wakes up to hear April announcing the Toy Fair opening. Determined to go, Michelangelo disguises himself as a Turtle toy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: The Neutrinos are attacked and their leaders, Zenter and Grizzla, are seized by Krang, Shredder and General Traag.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Widespread thievery is discovered in the city when Ninja Turtle artifacts are found missing. April and Irma prowl for the pilfering poachers, the investigation leads the reporter to the estate of Monroe Q.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: A commercial for the Personal Energy Projector (PEP), allowing the transfer of energy from one source to another, entices Krang. Targeting Earth, he drains the sphere's energy to strengthen the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987)
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker breaks in a new partner while protecting Alex from an ex-sheriff turned prisoner who blames Alex for putting him in jail and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker fears he may have to take down an old friend in town from Japan, knowing the man has ties to the Japanese mob.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker races to catch an ATM robber with a bounty hunter who's better known for bringing in his capture more dead than alive.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker's partner goes undercover and gets sent to prison. But the bus never makes it when a hurricane blows into Texas and Walker follows the escapees to a remote hotel where only the owners and a special friend still remain.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trouble arises when Alex tries to save a friends daughter from a religious cult and is captured.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When Walker visits the family of someone he once helped out, he stumbles across a parole officer who seems to be doing more than just his job with ex-cons.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When they capture a woman who took part in a jailbreak, she agrees to testify in New Orleans, which is where Walker and his partner are assigned to escort her to, much to the chagrin of Trivette, who had vacation plans instead.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker gets a sinking feeling in his guts when, after arresting two guys for trying to rob a club and shooting the bartender, Alex sets them free and won't give them a reason as to why it all happened.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When a woman goes against the State Police's beliefs that her father was a casualty of his own drunk driving, Walker believes her and stumbles across an illegal ring of toxic dumpers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker always seems to be just one step behind a vigilante, who gets the jump on the men Walker's supposed to arrest and takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A five-year-old case is coming to a close when a serial murderer is finally facing the death penalty. But everyone's dreams come back to haunt them and Walker follows his instincts in believing that they got the wrong man scheduled to die.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette go undercover to bust an illegal fight circuit.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker doesn't trust a couple of FBI agents, who are on the trail of a Native American accused of murder.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette are on the trail of a drug ring, while a new dean at the local college campus seems to have the inside track to Alex, impeding the investigation of several rapes in the past several months at the same time.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba gets involved when his cousin Candace and her husband Kevin are being blackmailed by Waylon Davis, the birth father of their adopted baby. Davis threatens to contest the adoption unless they cooperate, but will they give in to his demands?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Jeanette Marshall is a teacher in Sparta who has eye for the gentlemen, but her multiple romances attract negative attention from the townsfolk, and eccentric Ashe Crowe makes it his mission to put a permanent stop to Jeanette's flirtatious ways.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The fun and games come to a halt when Edgar Van Buren, the wealthy host of an annual high-stakes poker party, is murdered. Gillespie and Tibbs must sift through the evidence of a case where everyone is a suspect, including the dead man’s wife.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba finds himself in trouble when he is in involved in an accidental shooting while on the job. The only witness is Virgil's Aunt Ruda, whose grudge against Virgil may work against exonerating Bubba. Can anyone convince her to do what is right?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner returns to Los Angeles to tie up some unfinished business on an arson case in Sparta that’s connected to the mob in L.A. He reunites with Mike Chin, the star witness against the mob, and sparks fly once again between Bubba and Pat Day.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Cyrus Chambers and Tom Dalton are business partners in town, but when Cyrus decides he wants out of the partnership the trouble starts. Money and a secret love affair drive Tom to stop at nothing to bring Cyrus down, not even murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Wilson Sweet is curious about the murder of his grandfather over forty years ago and finds the incident may not have happened like he was told. An old bluesman in town has written a song about the murder and brings light to what really happened.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: For Bubba Skinner and his date Mary Ellen, a picnic ends in gunshots and the discovery of a large marijuana operation. When the wrong bullet slug is found on the ballistics report, Gillespie and Tibbs suspect that a Sheriff’s Deputy may be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: District Attorney Gerard Darnelle is tough on criminals and has made many enemies throughout his long career. When his daughter is kidnapped, the FBI arrives, but Gillespie and Tibbs sidestep them and follow their own leads to bring her home safely.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Lonnie Jamison helps Francie Miller, an old high school crush who’s in deep trouble and hitting the bottle, he finds a connection between Francie’s low-life boyfriend, Nick Crews, and a recent armed robbery of a local Sparta supermarket.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A greedy slumlord in the Bottoms, Keen Philbrick, is notorious for the cruel and unfair treatment of his tenants, and his ownership of two drug dens. When he’s found murdered, Gillespie will need the help of savvy Bottoms informant, Jimmy Dawes.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta police look into the murder of a wealthy invalid whose philandering husband is having an affair with a local beautician. All the evidence points to the beautician as the prime suspect, but she soon finds her own life is in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Jenny Sawyer, a victim of domestic abuse, is fearful of her husband, Wesley, but she constantly covers up for him and refuses help. When Wesley is murdered outside a local tavern, the police wonder if Jenny may have taken matters into her own hands.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Odessa Robbins is a civil rights hero in Sparta, and the town is planning a celebration of her life. Gillespie’s worries about old racial tensions resurfacing are sadly justified when the festivities are disrupted, putting Odessa’s life in danger.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.
