programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Carl look for shelter while Rick deals with old wounds; those left at the prison consider whether survival alone will be enough.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth remains hopeful, and she and Daryl search for other survivors of the Governor's attack; the now-divided group faces obstacles in their quest for safety.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick faces a number of threats while Carl and Michonne look for supplies; Glenn and Tara meet strangers on an important mission; other group members deal with their pasts.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: In the woods after fleeing the prison, Beth makes a request that sends her and Daryl on an enlightening mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group lives a more peaceful life at the prison and strives to hold onto humanity; problems arise when Rick encounters a new survivor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing a new enemy, Rick abandons his quiet lifestyle so that he and the others can fight to protect their hard-won livelihood.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group leaves the prison to search for supplies; the remaining members of the group deal with recent losses.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and a small group set out on foot in search of medicine, but their mission faces obstacles; Rick and Carol find two uninfected stragglers in a nearby town.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Assorted enemies pressure Rick and the group; the survivors and the prison may reach a breaking point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Following his defeat at Woodbury, the Governor wanders aimlessly until he encounters a family in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the camp outside the prison, the addition of new members threatens the peace; something new unfolds as the Governor plans his next move.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Things finally begin to calm at the prison until Rick and the group face imminent danger when the Governor arrives with his forces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Carl look for shelter while Rick deals with old wounds; those left at the prison consider whether survival alone will be enough.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth remains hopeful, and she and Daryl search for other survivors of the Governor's attack; the now-divided group faces obstacles in their quest for safety.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick faces a number of threats while Carl and Michonne look for supplies; Glenn and Tara meet strangers on an important mission; other group members deal with their pasts.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: In the woods after fleeing the prison, Beth makes a request that sends her and Daryl on an enlightening mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Beth siguen viajando juntos y Beth le revela que no quiere morir sin haber probado nunca el alcohol. A pesar de que Daryl se muestra contrario a sus intenciones, Beth se emborracha y, de esta forma, ambos se conocen mejor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras buscan Terminus, Maggie, Sasha y Bob discuten fuertemente y terminan separándose, sin percatarse de que son más vulnerables estando solos. Mientras, Daryl y Beth han encontrado cobijo en una funeraria, pero una horda de zombis los ataca.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los supervivientes de Woodbury se han unido al grupo de Rick en la prisión, crían animales, cultivan y todo parece ir bien. Sin embargo, el grupo va a descubrir que el peligro no siempre llega desde afuera.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick establece una cuarentena para evitar que el virus se propague entre la población de la cárcel. Tyreese descubre que alguien ha asesinado y quemado los cadáveres de su novia y su amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl encabeza un grupo que sale de la cárcel en busca de medicamentos y, durante el trayecto, oyen por radio que alguien habla de un santuario. Rick averigua quién asesinó a Karen y David y por qué lo hizo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Carol salen en busca de comida y ocurre algo que cambia su relación para siempre. Mientras, el otro grupo sigue buscando medicinas y, durante la misión, Bob le confiesa a Tyreese que es alcohólico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La salud de los enfermos empeora drásticamente aunque Hershel trate de salvar sus vidas como pueda. Rick revela a Maggie qué ha pasado con Carol, mientras que en las murallas de la prisión una muchedumbre de zombis amenaza con destruir la valla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras la caída de Woodbury, el Gobernador vaga sin rumbo hasta que encuentra a una familia cuyo patriarca está moribundo. El Gobernador se encariña especialmente con Lilly, una niña autista a la que promete proteger siempre.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador se da cuenta de que el grupo de Martínez es débil, a pesar de que tienen un gran arsenal. Además, localiza a quienes le arrebataron todo lo que tenía.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador captura a Hershel y Michonne y exige al grupo salir de la prisión. Sin embargo, Rick y su gente no van a dejarse vencer sin presentar batalla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de la batalla contra el Gobernador, Rick y Carl encuentran una casa en la que Rick intenta reponerse de sus graves heridas y Carl sale en busca de alimentos. Mientras, Michonne trata de encontrarlos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes del ataque vagan por el bosque, diseminados en grupos pequeños, en busca de cobijo. Tyreese, Lizzie y Mika se topan con una antigua conocida. Mientras, Daryl y Beth buscan a los demás y Glenn despierta en la prisión solo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Carl y Michonne se encuentran con un grupo de hombres extremadamente peligrosos en una casa aparentemente vacía. Mientras, Glenn y Tara conocen a unas personas que viajan hacia Washington D. C.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Beth siguen viajando juntos y Beth le revela que no quiere morir sin haber probado nunca el alcohol. A pesar de que Daryl se muestra contrario a sus intenciones, Beth se emborracha y, de esta forma, ambos se conocen mejor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras buscan Terminus, Maggie, Sasha y Bob discuten fuertemente y terminan separándose, sin percatarse de que son más vulnerables estando solos. Mientras, Daryl y Beth han encontrado cobijo en una funeraria, pero una horda de zombis los ataca.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tyreese, Carol, Lizzie, Mika y Judith llegan a una cabaña mientras buscan Terminus. Allí, Lizzie enloquece y muestra una fascinación por la muerte que hiela la sangre de Carol y Tyreese.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. secret agent James T. West is lured into a hospital where he is gassed and carried out in a coffin by the weird, zombie-like aides of one Dr. Arcularis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a notorious desperado, Frank Slade, inaplan to arrest a Mexican bandit, Colonel Vasquez, who has been robbing banks in American border towns and then fleeing to the sanctuary of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Iron Man Torres strangles a shop owner named Gilbert as secret agent James T. West passes by.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon set out to crack a thriving opium-and-alien smuggling operation in San Francisco and become involved in struggle for control of Hunan Province, China.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West is investigating the loss of government suppliers of kerosene and copper when his stagecoach is halted by a sheet of flame.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon, assigned to protect a Middle Eastern despot from assassination, find their task complicated by the attitude of the degenerate tyrant, Emir El Emid.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon help Governor Lewis keep the state of California solvent by seeing that a pledged $5,000,000 from each of three wealthy but disreputable personsis turned over to the governor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two U.S. Supreme Court Justices have died mysteriously but Justice Chaynedis misses secret agent James T. West's concern for his life.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a Federal prison inspector and his side-kick, Artemus Gordon, pretends he is a preacher when the two are assigned to halt an organized outbreak of terror that has paralyzed a western community.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon are assigned to protect South Seas island prince who insists on going to an exclusive health resort where assassins are waiting to kill him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West, probing the murder by fire of one of his former professors, Dr. Robey, a distinguished archaeologist, is ordered off the case at the request of U.S. Senator Hungerford.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Posing as a notorious hired gunman and a corrupt colonel, secret agents James T.West and Artemus Gordon infiltrate the forces of renegade-army leader Thorald Wolfe.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West is asking the Serbian minister to place his country's fabulous Kara diamond in federal custody until the International Jewel Exhibit opens, when suddenly the gem's case explodes and the jewel disappears.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A tall, powerfully built girl, Kitten Twitty, registers at a hotel and secret agent James T. West carries her trunk to her room, not knowing it contains his archenemy—diminutive, giggling Dr. Loveless.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Scully finds herself in a desolate area where people worship a hitchhiker.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A boy who vanished ten years earlier reappears... but has not aged a day.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A man realizes he's been given a second chance.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A cult leader has the ability to project himself into his victim's dreams.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Scully and Doggett investigate a killer with X-ray vision.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Scully and Doggett track a metallic man bent on revenge for his condition.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: The agents pursue an Indian mystic who can manipulate the human mind.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A mystery involves Mulder and a creature linked to Native American lore.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Doggett tries to solve a mystery behind deaths in a Boston subway tunnel.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Scully fears that she and another woman will give birth to alien babies.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: The agents investigate a UFO that deposited ailing abductees back on Earth.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: After Mulder is put to rest, an alien abductee’s body comes back to life.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A U.S. census worker warns the White House about an alien invasion.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A man may be connected with the death of Doggett's son years earlier.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A composite deck is installed. The basement gets insulated. Unconventional HVAC zoning is discussed. Kevin tours a stove factory in Reading, PA. Solar panels and their backup system are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The master bathroom gets a plaster treatment. Windowsills are replicated in Dracut, MA. A kitchen garden, recessed lighting, and floating countertop are installed. New wood floors change directions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1880s Country Cape is finished. The cast arrives and reflects on the changes that have been made since Charlie's crew started work. The homeowners take Kevin and Tommy on a tour of the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: TOH TV heads to Bedford, MA, to check out their new project: a colonial-era home. The Homeowners plan to preserve the historic part of the house while adding space and amenities with two additions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger transplants shrubs and plants from the front. Kevin and Norm remove the front entry porch and clapboards. Tom shows the layout for the new addition. Roger sets up a drain and sump pump system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Mark open up a hole in the old fieldstone foundation. Historic sashes are taken off for rehab. Richard sees the oldest flag in the country. Tom forms the new addition’s foundation out of ICFs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds the walls of the entry addition framed up. Tom creates the connection to the main house. Mark repairs the chimney and the kitchen fireplace gets removed. Norm revisits the Acton Project.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn Nawada shows the landscape plan. Roger removes invasive vines and brambles. Tom raises a new gable wall. Kevin repairs a historic window sill. Norm and Kevin demo the ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin explains the benefits of using OSB sheathing. Tom removes a cast iron pipe obstructing structural beams. Norm sees our historic window sash repaired. Tom takes down the old wall of the ell.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom adds insulation to the oldest part of the house. Roger gets a lesson in building a cook's garden. Jenn and Roger build raised beds out of old fieldstone. Tom waterproofs the new roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom replaces a rotted post. Restored historic window sashes are installed. The garage's electrical service is upgraded. Kevin shows the kitchen's inspiration. Tom removes reveals historic boards.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs new red cedar clapboards. Richard helps remove some old kitchen plumbing. Roger installs a new asphalt driveway. Richard shows how he's solving a rough plumbing problem.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tom create a historically accurate front door. The ailing American Beech tree gets saved. Kevin shows an antique home. Interior designers share the direction for the new space.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a granite front step and spreads ryegrass on the lawn. Tom installs new wood windows. Norm visits the Colonel James Barrett house. Richard seals and insulates the old ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Norm install decorative timbers. Richard shows A/C condensers' concrete mounting pad. Norm visits the Parson Capen House in MA. Tom uses a new hidden deck fastening system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger creates a winding brick path. Fitting a modern kitchen into an old house. Richard shows a zero-clearance gas fireplace. Norm makes wainscoting out of old boards. White oak floorboards go down.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom restores the c. 1720 front door and makes "barn" doors for the pantry. Richard shows a new zone damper system. Mark installs a hearth using reclaimed bricks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger lays the driveway finish. Custom wall coverings and ironwork are installed. Tom shows the new garage door. Richard shows the latest water heaters. We see family room and kitchen lighting plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger and Jenn install plant material. Backsplash tile, wallpaper, and metalwork are installed. We see the finished kitchen and design choices. The wrap party begins.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This 1880 Country Cape started as a small house on a large piece of land but was added onto over time. The crew meets the homeowners and tours both inside and outside to learn about the plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Appliances and radiators are salvaged before the major demolition begins. Outside, an arborist sprays the Hemlock trees to protect from damaging insects. Time to cut off the garage addition.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old foundation gets modified for the new basement. Jenn meets with the landscape designer to discuss the plans for the front yard. On the first floor, Charlie and Tom install a recessed beam.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The foundation is waterproofed. Exterior paint colors are discussed. Homeowner Megan lends a hand turning the new newel posts. Cape style homes are discussed. The foundation is braced for backfilling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old foundation is transitioned to the new. Natural stone is cut into veneers. A new beam is installed on the back dormer for more headroom. Homeowner Megan and her interior designer look at tile.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A Flitch beam is installed. Tree maintenance is performed. A new footing is poured under the kitchen chimney. Sheathing systems are explored. Kevin tours a high-tech sheathing factory in Georgia.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A block wall is constructed to accept the addition framing. The old floor joists are shimmed to make a smooth transition to the new part of the house. The kitchen designer lays out the kitchen.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A bay window is removed and reframed for a new. An old school is being restored into apartments for veterans. The underside of a deck is the "roof" of living space below. Pipe locations are discussed.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper feels convinced that his niece will be safe going out with Jack, and Jack would rather be with Janet and Chrissy celebrating Janet's birthday, until he sees the niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's fast-talking friend, Larry, gives Jack and the girls a puppy and the kids go to all lengths keeping this from Roper who forbids animals in his building.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has guilt feelings about not standing up to the tough guy who makes a play for Chrissy at the local pub and goes back the next night to tell the Casanova off.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Panic reigns in the apartment when Mr. Roper takes the rent money without leaving the girls and Jack a receipt, making them think their place was robbed.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy walk in while Janet is entertaining a date, fostering a new rule on privacy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, realizing he can't meet his obligations to pay his share of the rent, gets a part-time modeling job only to find out that he's expected to pose nude. Guest Star(s): Sally Kirkland

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy apparently do Janet a disfavor by talking her into trying for a promotion at the florist shop where she works.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunting

programme.title: Tiny House Hunting

programme.title: Tiny House Hunting
programme.desc: Outdoor lovers Ben and Dylan are looking for a tiny home on the range outside of Billings in rural Mont.; Ben wants a mobile abode so the couple can move one day without moving out, while Dylan is all about planting roots.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunting

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Phillip N'dou
programme.desc: On November 1st, 2003 Floyd Mayweather and Phillip N'dou fought eachother for the WBC world lightweight title at the Van Andel Arena in Grand Rapids with Mayweather ending the bout early for a technical knockout victory

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Joe Ruelaz
programme.desc: On August 9th, 1984, Freddie Roach fought Joe Ruelaz in a super featherweight bout in Las Vegas. The more experienced Roach made easy work of Ruelaz, stopping him in the fourth round.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Mario Chavez
programme.desc: On May 28th, 1981 Freddie Roach faced Mario Chavez at the Hacienda Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Roach.

programme.title: Genaro Hernandez vs Azumah Nelson
programme.desc: On March 22nd, 1997, Genaro Hernandez fought Azumah Nelson for the World Super Featherweight Championship at the Memorial Coliseum in Corpus Christi. Hernandez looked like the more confident fighter, earning a close split decision victory.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Adilson Rodrigues
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 George Foreman fought Adilson Rodrigues at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a victory for Foreman in round two by technical knockout.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Alex Stewart
programme.desc: On April 11th, 1992 George Foreman faced Alex Stewart at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas ending in a majority decision victory for Foreman.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Gerry Cooney
programme.desc: On January 15th, 1990 George Foreman and Gerry Cooney fought at the Reno-Sparks Convention Center in Reno, Las Vegas ending in a majority decision victory for Foreman.

programme.title: George Kambosos vs Devin Haney 1
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2022 George Kambosos and Devin Haney fought for the first time at Marvel Stadium in Melboure for the IBF, WBA, WBC & WBO World lightweight titles resulting in a victory for Devin Haney.

programme.title: Giovani Santillan vs Angel Ruiz
programme.desc: On October 15th, 2021 Giovani Santillan and Angel Ruiz fought eachother in a 10 round bout at the Pechanga Arena in San Diego resulting in a victory for Santillan.

programme.title: Hector Camacho vs Sugar Ray Leonard
programme.desc: On January 3rd, 1997 Hector Camacho faced Sugar Ray Leonard at the Convention Center in Atlantic City battling for IBC Middleweight title the bout ended after five rounds resulting in a victory for Leonard by technical knockout.

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 1
programme.desc: On June 6th, 1988 Iran Barkley faces Thomas Hearns for the first time at the Las Vegas Hilton Center they battle for the WBC World Middleweight title with the bout lasting 3 rounds resulting in a victory for Barkley.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 2
programme.desc: On March 20th, 1992 Iran Barkley and Thomas Hearns fought for a second time at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for WBA World Light heavyweight title, the fight resulted in a split decision win for Barkley.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Adam Lopez
programme.desc: On June 19th, 2021 Issac Dogboe faced Adam Lopez in a 10 round bout for the North American Boxing Federation Featherweight title that ended in a majority decision victory for Dogboe.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Jessie Magdaleno
programme.desc: On April 28th, 2018, Isaac Dogboe and Jessie Magdaleno fought at the Liacouras Center in Philadelphia. With Dogboe going down in round one and Magdaleno down in round five and twice in round 11, Dogboe took the victory.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth's core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts in New York City. Once he is repaired by his human friend Raoul, the two uncover a Decepticon plan to turn the cars into an unstoppable Decepticon army!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Thought to be extinct, four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes. When their team leader Aleta-1 is captured, Megatron uses her to force Optimus Prime to surrender himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high... even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power. Using a molecule-freezing device to take Megatron and Starscream out of the picture, the two are free to lead how they see fit.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought. This leads the Decepticons deep into the heart of Cybertron to steal Vector Sigma, the computer that brought life to those on the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car - a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island. There he finds the remains of World War II battle vehicles and decides to use them as the basis for his own attack team, the Combaticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: United as “Bruticus,” the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable. They plan to pull the Earth into the Sun to eliminate all of their enemies at once. The only hope is for the Autobots and Decepticons to join forces to take Bruticus down!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters to expose a ring of human thieves stealing aircraft. But when they learn that Megatron is behind the scheme, they must combine with the other Aerialbots to convert into Superion!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Three high school students create more trouble than they can handle when they use a Decepticon personality component in their science fair project. The Autobots come to rescue the students, but the science project may actually have to save the Autobots!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Furious over Celina's failure at the Friendship Cup, Roget sends a squad of Sector Security to seize her.

programme.desc: Obelisk Force has invaded New Domino City to capture Zuzu and Celina! Can Yuya and his friends stop this unstoppable force?

programme.desc: Barrett has returned to snatch Celina back to Duel Academy – unless the Lancers can stop him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Chain Game
programme.desc: Barrett has chained up Yuya and his monsters! Can Yuya break his shackles before Barrett breaks away with Celina?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Tragic Reunion

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Cat feels left out by Jade and Sam, so she befriends an old friend of Sam's; this competition for affection ends up getting out of hand.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam tries to get revenge on Cat by befriending Robbie; Dice wins a tank of man-eating tuna fish in a poker game.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat begin to notice that their friends are obsessed with a new phone game; the audience is distracted at Cat's one woman show.

programme.title: Victorious: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.

programme.title: Victorious: Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Cat begins dating Tori's ex-boyfriend, Danny (Matt Angel) and Tori becomes jealous. Meanwhile, Trina convinces Robbie, Andre, Jade and Beck to indulge their feet in callus-eating fish that she's been buying from some stranger.

programme.title: Victorious: Sleepover at Sikowitz's
programme.desc: Sikowitz invites the gang to have a sleepover at his house in order to teach them a lesson in method acting.

programme.title: Victorious: The Wood
programme.desc: The kids are excited to hear that they'll be the stars of a new reality show being filmed at Hollywood Arts. Meanwhile, Trina and Robbie are forced to work at The Grub Truck after injuring Festus.

programme.title: Victorious: The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: Victorious: Wok Star
programme.desc: Tori agrees to help Jade find a theater to perform a play Jade wrote. But when the sponsor demands changes that will ruin Jade's play, Tori has to make things right before opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Survival of the Hottest
programme.desc: A heat wave hits LA and the gang heads for the beach in Beck's RV. But once there, they find themselves trapped inside the RV as the temperature rises. Oblivious, Cat parties it up with some cute boys.

programme.title: Victorious: Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed, leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat, but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Victorious: Freak the Freak Out
programme.desc: Tori's friends sing at a local karaoke club and end up competing with a pair of stuck-up girls who are regular performers there. Competing with those girls proves to be more difficult than they expect, since one of the girls' father owns the club.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck Falls for Tori
programme.desc: Tori auditions for a role in a movie. But after exaggerating on her resume, she gets hired as a stunt double. When Tori finds out her stunt is falling off a building, she's not sure she can do it.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iSaw Him First: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iOwe You: Sam is insulted when Freddie accuses her of not paying him and Carly back any of the money she's constantly borrowing.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iHurt Lewbert: A "Messing With Lewbert" sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iPie: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.
